title: Slab Expansion
description: Slab Expansion creates new slab variants for you to decorate your base and world with!
body:
📖 What's this mod?
Ever wanted to expand your building options in Minecraft? Slab Expansion is here to enrich your creativity! This mod introduces a variety of new slab variants that allow you to decorate your base and world in unique ways. Whether you're looking to craft detailed pathways, intricate roofs, or stylish furniture pieces, Slab Expansion provides the perfect blocks to bring your architectural dreams to life.

Enhance your Minecraft experience with an assortment of beautifully crafted slabs that seamlessly integrate with the game's aesthetic. Each slab variant offers endless possibilities for customizing your builds. Discover new ways to express your style and transform your Minecraft world with Slab Expansion today!
